anime_list.title: Attack on Titan
anime_list.author: Hajime Isayama
anime_list.desc: Humanity lives inside cities surrounded by enormous walls due to Titans, gigantic humanoid creatures who devour humans. Eren Yeager vows to exterminate them all after his hometown is destroyed.

anime_list.title: Fullmetal Alchemist
anime_list.author: Hiromu Arakawa
anime_list.desc: Two brothers use alchemy to try to bring their dead mother back to life, but the attempt goes wrong. They set off on a journey to find the Philosopher's Stone to restore their bodies.

anime_list.title: Death Note
anime_list.author: Tsugumi Ohba
anime_list.desc: A high school student discovers a supernatural notebook that kills anyone whose name is written in it. He decides to use it to rid the world of criminals, attracting the attention of a genius detective.

anime_list.title: Naruto
anime_list.author: Masashi Kishimoto
anime_list.desc: Naruto Uzumaki is a young ninja who seeks recognition from his peers and dreams of becoming the Hokage, the leader of his village. A story of friendship, sacrifice, and never giving up.

anime_list.title: One Piece
anime_list.author: Eiichiro Oda
anime_list.desc: Monkey D. Luffy sets sail with his crew of pirates to find the legendary treasure One Piece and become the King of the Pirates. The greatest adventure manga ever told.

anime_list.title: Demon Slayer
anime_list.author: Koyoharu Gotouge
anime_list.desc: Tanjiro Kamado becomes a demon slayer after his family is slaughtered and his sister Nezuko is turned into a demon. He trains to find a cure and avenge his family.
